description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a deep navy blue upholstered seat and backrest, set within a wooden frame that extends to form a side platform or table. The seat and back cushions are thick, rectangular, and appear integrated into the frame, providing a clean, minimalist look. The wooden frame is a warm brown color, with straight lines and a boxy silhouette, and the right side features an extended flat surface that could serve as a side table or platform. The legs are short and blocky, matching the frame's material and color, and provide sturdy support. The armrest is present only on the left side, forming a solid wooden panel that matches the rest of the frame. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces.
description: A modern navy blue cushioned couch with a wooden frame and an integrated side platform, featuring a single left armrest and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the navy blue seat and back cushions, left wooden armrest, and the right-side wooden platform.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid wooden armrest and the depth of the seat cushion, with the platform extending to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous wooden back panel and the full length of the side platform.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the absence of an armrest and the solid wooden side, with the platform clearly visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat and back cushions, both integrated and non-tufted, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid navy blue fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface and no visible decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style wooden legs, exposed and matching the frame, with a simple rectangular profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Single left-side armrest, straight and solid, formed by a vertical wooden panel integrated into the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a single, thick, integrated cushion, non-tufted and rectangular.
